introSection:
Screamin' Demon was a steel spinning roller coaster located at Castle Park in Riverside, California, USA.

Screamin' Demon opened at Castle Park in 2008, and closed permanently in 2023.
fullText:
Screamin' Demon was a steel spinning roller coaster located at Castle Park in Riverside, California, USA.

Screamin' Demon opened at Castle Park in 2008, and closed permanently in 2023.
